description.para: Register offsets from the base address of the device.
Interval Value Register is the maximum value the counter will count up or down to.
Definitions for Match registers, each timer counter has three match registers.
Following register bit mask is for all interrupt registers.

briefdescription.para: Read the given Timer Counter register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the timer counter device.
is the register offset to be read

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XTtcPs_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: Write the given Timer Counter register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the timer counter device.
is the register offset to be written
is the 32-bit value to write to the register

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XTtcPs_WriteReg(XTtcPs BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: Calculate a match register offset using the Match Register index.

parameterdescription.para: is the 0-2 value of the match register
